title: EnergyCommunityMember
description: Schema for an Energy Community Member entity representing a participant in an energy community with their role and associated devices.

id.description: Unique identifier of the entity in URN format (urn:ngsi-ld:EnergyCommunityMember:<instance-id>)

type.description: NGSI-LD entity type, must be EnergyCommunityMember

memberRole.description: Role of the member in the energy community: producer (generates energy), consumer (uses energy), or prosumer (both produces and consumes)

membershipStatus.description: Current membership status indicating whether the member is actively participating in the community

joinDate.description: Date and time when the member joined the energy community, in ISO 8601 format

address.description: Postal address of the community member

location.description: GeoJSON Point representing the geographic location of the member

coordinates.description: Array of [longitude, latitude] or [longitude, latitude, altitude]

refCommunity.description: URN reference to the EnergyCommunity entity this member belongs to (urn:ngsi-ld:EnergyCommunity:<instance-id>)

hasDevices.description: Array of URN references to device entities (smart meters, microinverters, batteries) associated with this member
